commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `OPENCLAW_WHATSAPP_WEB_SOCKET_URL`, validates `ws://` or `wss://`, passes it to Baileys as `waWebSocketUrl`, and adds session plus dotenv trust-boundary tests.

PR surface: Source +24, Tests +32. Total +56 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the PR head reads the override after `resolveEnvProxyAgent`, while the proxy helper applies `NO_PROXY` to the target URL it receives. I did not run a live socket, but the `HTTPS_PROXY` plus loopback override failure path is clear from the call order and helper contract.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can thread the selected WebSocket URL into proxy resolution and add the missing regression test; maintainer acceptance of the env surface remains a separate review step.

target.title: Allow WhatsApp WebSocket URL override
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

The WhatsApp plugin had no minimal way to point the real Baileys client at an alternate WhatsApp Web-compatible socket endpoint.

## Why This Change Was Made

This adds a generic `OPENCLAW_WHATSAPP_WEB_SOCKET_URL` env override in the WhatsApp session creation path. When set, it is validated as `ws://` or `wss://` and passed through to Baileys as `waWebSocketUrl`; when unset, normal production behavior continues to use Baileys defaults.

Related Crabline PR: https://github.com/openclaw/crabline/pull/23

## User Impact

Production users see no behavior change by default. QA and local test infrastructure can point WhatsApp at a mock socket server without adding Crabline-specific imports, config schema, fixture plumbing, or alternate socket factories to the WhatsApp plugin.

## Evidence

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/whatsapp/src/session.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/whatsapp/src/session.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/session.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxlint --deny-warnings --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.extensions.json extensions/whatsapp/src/session.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/session.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions:test`
target.author: romneyda
